title: Structure of a General Multiplicative Seasonal ARIMA Model (SARIMA)
description: A flowchart illustrating the components and relationships in a general SARIMA model, showing how non-seasonal and seasonal elements combine.
relationships: Input series undergoes non-seasonal (d) and seasonal (D) differencing to become stationary
The stationary series is modeled as a combination of its own past values (AR terms) and past errors (MA terms)
The model multiplies the non-seasonal AR polynomial by the seasonal AR polynomial
The model multiplies the non-seasonal MA polynomial by the seasonal MA polynomial
The final model output is a function of the differenced series, AR components, MA components, and white noise
